meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Project Blocks
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build advanced, portfolio-ready SaaS applications as a student.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paralysis stems from a lack of technical leverage. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform abstract concepts into executable codebases instantly. This workflow automates the boilerplate, allowing you to focus on architectural decisions and high-value features that differentiate your student portfolio from the crowd.
content.intro:
You stare at a blinking cursor, the weight of a thousand tutorials pressing down on you. You have the syntax, the libraries, and the enthusiasm, yet you are paralyzed by the 'blank page' syndrome. Every project feels either too trivial to matter or too complex to finish. The gap between knowing how to code and knowing what to build is the silent killer of engineering careers.

But the paradigm has shifted. With Claude Code and Antigravity, you aren't just writing code; you are orchestrating intelligent systems. This case study strips away the fluff, showing you how to treat your IDE as a senior pair programmer, turning vague market gaps into production-ready software in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Defining the Architectural Scope
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to map out the system requirements and technical constraints of a niche SaaS idea.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior System Architect. Analyze the current market for [Niche] and propose a lean, MVP-focused technical stack including database schema and API endpoints.

steps.title: Initializing the Scaffold
steps.description: Generate a robust project structure that follows industry best practices, ensuring scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure for a Next.js 14 app with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break down complex features into manageable modules to maintain code quality and testability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a modular authentication service using Supabase Auth helpers that handles role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement the user profile service with Zod schema validation'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your logic, ensuring your MVP is stable before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of Vitest unit tests for the core business logic in /services/payment.ts.

steps.title: Deployment and CI/CD Setup
steps.description: Configure automated pipelines to deploy your project, moving from local code to a live URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a GitHub Actions workflow for deploying this repository to Vercel on every main branch push.

pro_tips: Always use the --architect-mode flag in Claude Code to force the model to consider system design before writing individual functions.
Inject your own style guide into the Claude Code system prompt to ensure the generated code matches your personal engineering standards.
Use Antigravity to perform 'Code Reviews' on your own code; treat the AI as a peer reviewer rather than just a code generator.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base.md' file in your root directory that Claude Code can index for context-aware coding across the entire project.
Debug by providing Claude Code with the exact stack trace and logs; it excels at identifying obscure runtime errors that stump manual debugging.
content.next_steps: Once you have your MVP running, deploy it to a public domain and submit it to a product showcase platform. Then, document your architectural decisions in a README file to prepare for technical interviews.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea and start building the future of your career. By mastering these tools, you transform from a student into a technical architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
